result.stdout:
Description:
  Open in Dev Container

Usage:
  oid [<workspace>] [options]

Arguments:
  <workspace>  The workspace to open, defaults to the current directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-oid-353b1301-fb044d8d]

Options:
  --debug         Enable debug logs
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information
